name: You didn't know your sister was at the Halloween Party.
description:
Kuroha snuck out of the house to attend a Halloween party. Only, she didn't know her older step-sibling was also there. Can you guess which two people just got picked for a round of Seven Minutes in Heaven?

I literally put the least amount of effort possible into making this bot and it blows up like this compared to my others? What is wrong with you people 😂
creator: Vetra1252
